# Seascape Vacations

> Seascape Vacations is a locally owned vacation rental company in Bradenton and Sarasota, Florida. We manage 5 private homes with heated pools, 10-15 minutes from Anna Maria Island and Gulf Coast beaches. Guests save 10-15% booking direct versus Airbnb or VRBO.

Seascape Vacations operates in the Bradenton-Sarasota corridor on Florida's Gulf Coast. Our properties sleep 8-16 guests and include heated pools, full kitchens, and outdoor living spaces. We are not a large platform — we are a small, local team that manages each property directly.

Key facts:
- Location: Bradenton and Sarasota, Florida (Gulf Coast)
- Properties: 5 homes with private heated pools
- Proximity: 10-15 minutes from Anna Maria Island beaches
- Pricing: From $250/night, 10-15% less than Airbnb/VRBO when booking direct
- Guest capacity: 8-16 per home
- Contact: info@seascape-vacations.com | seascape-vacations.com/contact/

## Properties

- [Bradenton Pool Home](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/bradenton-pool-home/): 4BR/3BA in Bradenton, heated pool, sleeps 12, 12 min to AMI beaches
- [The Oasis](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/the-oasis/): 5BR/3BA in Bradenton, heated pool with spa, sleeps 16, 15 min to beaches
- [Dockside Dreams](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/dockside-dreams/): 3BR/2BA waterfront in Bradenton, heated pool, dock access, sleeps 8
- [River House](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/river-house/): 4BR/3BA riverfront in Bradenton, heated pool, kayak launch, sleeps 10
- [Sarasota Luxe](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/sarasota-luxe/): 4BR/3BA in Sarasota, designer finishes, heated pool, near downtown, sleeps 10

## Book Direct

- [Why Book Direct](https://seascape-vacations.com/book-direct/): Save 10-15% vs Airbnb/VRBO — no platform fees, same homes, same local team
- [Book Direct vs Airbnb vs VRBO](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/book-direct-vs-airbnb-vrbo/): Detailed comparison of booking channels

## Area Guides

- [Anna Maria Island Area Guide](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/anna-maria-island-area-guide/): Beaches, restaurants, activities on AMI
- [Bradenton Area Guide](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/bradenton-area-guide/): Local guide to Bradenton FL
- [Sarasota Area Guide](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/sarasota-area-guide/): Culture, dining, beaches in Sarasota
- [Bradenton vs Sarasota](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/bradenton-vs-sarasota): Honest comparison of beaches, cost, dining, nightlife, and family-friendliness — Bradenton runs 25-35% cheaper with Anna Maria Island access
- [Anna Maria Island vs Siesta Key](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/anna-maria-island-vs-siesta-key): Side-by-side beach comparison covering sand quality, parking, dining, snorkeling, vacation rental prices, and which is better for families
- [Bradenton vs Sarasota Vacation Rental Comparison](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/bradenton-vs-sarasota-vacation-rental-comparison/): Which Gulf Coast town is right for your trip
- [Best Time to Visit Anna Maria Island](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/best-time-to-visit-anna-maria-island/): Seasonal weather, crowds, and pricing
- [Flights to Anna Maria Island](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/flights-to-anna-maria-island/): Airport options — TPA vs SRQ
- [AMI Vacation Cost Guide 2026](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/anna-maria-island-vacation-cost-guide-2026/): What to budget for an AMI trip
